name: Chow-Chow Relish
recipeIngredient: 2 cups chopped sweet green peppers (4 small)
1 cup chopped sweet red peppers (2 small)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped vegetables.
2. Sprinkle with salt and let stand for 4-6 hours in a cool place.
3. Drain well.
4. In a large saucepot, combine vinegar, sugar, celery seed, dry mustard, mustard seed, turmeric, ginger.
5. Simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Add the vegetables and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
7. Bring to a boil.
8. Pack hot relish into hot jars, leaving 1/4 inch headspace.
9. Adjust lids and process in boiling water bath for 10 minutes.
10. Makes 4 pints.
